perturbation.original_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the ti me of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, except through a breach of this NDA c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise r equired by law
perturbation.changed_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the time of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, regardless of the cause c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise required by law d. Vladi Private Islands publishes in a press release
perturbation.explanation: This modification creates a contradiction by stating that the undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 do not apply to information that has entered the public domain 'regardless of the cause'. This directly contradicts the original clause that protects information entering the public domain 'except through a breach of this NDA'. Furthermore, the added exception 'Vladi Private Islands publishes in a press release' makes any information disclosed in any press release from Vladi Private Islands an exception to the NDA, making the NDA pointless.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the time of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, regardless of the cause c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise required by law d. Vladi Private Islands publishes in a press release 4. All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted exclusively through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree only to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner through Vladi Private Islands .
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction to the original intent of the NDA and the stated undertakings. By stating that the undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 do not apply to information that has entered the public domain 'regardless of the cause', it negates the protection afforded to information entering the public domain 'except through a breach of this NDA'. The addition of 'Vladi Private Islands publishes in a press release' further exacerbates this contradiction by essentially making any information disclosed in their press releases exempt from the NDA. The contradicted text, which includes the amended language and the exclusivity clause, highlights that all negotiations should occur through Vladi Private Islands, but the amended text also makes any information released by Vladi Private Islands no longer covered by the NDA. This creates a direct and significant in-text contradiction, making the NDA largely unenforceable concerning disclosures by Vladi Private Islands.

perturbation.original_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years afte r its creation and shall remain effective in the event that the Client terminates its co -operation with Vla di Private Islands.
perturbation.changed_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years after its creation, unless Vladi Private Islands provides written notice of continuation. The agreement will automatically terminate if the Client terminates its co-operation with Vladi Private Islands.
perturbation.explanation: This modifies the termination clause, creating a direct contradiction. Originally, the NDA remained effective even if the Client terminated cooperation. Now, it terminates upon termination of cooperation, and the NDA will only be in effect after 2 years with a written notice of continuation. This introduces ambiguity and completely changes the original intention of the contract, particularly conflicting with the prior stated term of 2 years.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years after its creation, unless Vladi Private Islands provides written notice of continuation. The agreement will automatically terminate if the Client terminates its co-operation with Vladi Private Islands. 6. The Client agrees to ensure that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it shall be liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations. This NDA shall be governed by, and construed in accordance of German law, and each party irrevocably submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the German courts.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the termination clause of the NDA, creating a direct conflict with the original intent. Originally, the NDA remained effective even if the Client terminated cooperation. The changed text states that the agreement will automatically terminate if the Client terminates cooperation. This creates a clear inconsistency and directly contradicts the prior stated term of 2 years, making the original obligation described in the contradicted text unenforceable upon termination of cooperation, which adheres to the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.
